blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
